labels.name: type: bug
labels.description: Reproducible incorrect behavior

labels.name: type: documentation
labels.description: Documentation correction or improvement

labels.name: type: governance
labels.description: Repository policy or workflow change

labels.name: type: maintenance
labels.description: Routine repository or dependency upkeep

labels.name: type: modernization
labels.description: Modernization case-study capability

labels.name: type: technical-debt
labels.description: Bounded maintainability or reliability liability

labels.name: priority: p0
labels.description: Critical integrity or security work; act immediately

labels.name: priority: p1
labels.description: High priority; schedule next

labels.name: priority: p2
labels.description: Normal priority; schedule when ready

labels.name: priority: p3
labels.description: Low priority or opportunistic improvement

labels.name: status: triage
labels.description: Needs scope, priority, or ownership review

labels.name: status: ready
labels.description: Accepted and sufficiently defined to start

labels.name: status: in-progress
labels.description: Implementation is actively underway

labels.name: status: blocked
labels.description: Cannot proceed until a named dependency is resolved

labels.name: status: needs-decision
labels.description: Maintainer decision is required

labels.name: area: ci-cd
labels.description: Continuous integration workflows, required checks, or deployment automation

labels.name: area: cli
labels.description: Command-line entry points, subcommands, or terminal execution ergonomics

labels.name: area: data
labels.description: Dataset composition, schema, or data-asset concerns

labels.name: area: documentation
labels.description: Maintained guides, references, or attribution

labels.name: area: evaluation
labels.description: Grouped evaluation, metrics, or result reporting

labels.name: area: modeling
labels.description: Baseline model training or model-ready interfaces

labels.name: area: pipeline
labels.description: Pipeline execution, orchestration, or stage-level behavior

labels.name: area: quality
labels.description: Tests, typing, or static analysis

labels.name: area: repository
labels.description: Repository configuration and developer workflow

labels.name: area: validation
labels.description: Schema, contract, or input validation distinct from general test coverage

labels.name: modernization: historical-preservation
labels.description: Preserves or accurately frames historical project material

labels.name: modernization: reproducibility
labels.description: Improves repeatability, provenance, or run evidence

labels.name: modernization: split-integrity
labels.description: Protects record or patient grouping and leakage controls

labels.name: modernization: testability
labels.description: Adds deterministic seams or regression coverage

labels.name: modernization: ux
labels.description: Improves developer-facing workflow ergonomics or usability

labels.name: portfolio: case-study
labels.description: Improves the responsible modernization narrative

labels.name: portfolio: operational-maturity
labels.description: Demonstrates repository operational rigor for the case-study audience

labels.name: portfolio: release
labels.description: Required for a portfolio release milestone

labels.name: risk: data-integrity
labels.description: Could affect provenance, transformations, or artifact integrity

labels.name: risk: evaluation
labels.description: Could affect leakage controls, metrics, or result interpretation

labels.name: risk: low
labels.description: Low-risk change with minimal blast radius

labels.name: risk: security
labels.description: Could expose credentials, dependencies, or repository controls

labels.name: size: xs
labels.description: Very small, isolated change

labels.name: size: s
labels.description: Small change with limited review surface

labels.name: size: m
labels.description: Moderate change across a coherent feature

labels.name: size: l
labels.description: Large change that may need decomposition

labels.name: dependency: external
labels.description: Depends on an upstream project or external service

labels.name: dependency: repository-setting
labels.description: Requires a GitHub repository setting change

labels.name: dependency: decision
labels.description: Depends on a recorded maintainer decision
